notes: Congenital anomaly catalog used by Phase 1D.4 anomaly generation and inherited developmental liability. Sex-development DSD entries are reserved for later advanced DSD activation.

anomalies.label: Cryptorchidism
anomalies.notes: One or both testes fail to descend; primarily affects sire fertility.

anomalies.label: Malocclusion
anomalies.notes: Jaw or tooth alignment problem that can affect feeding efficiency.

anomalies.label: Malformed Tail
anomalies.notes: Kinked, shortened, or malformed tail vertebrae.

anomalies.label: Polydactyly
anomalies.notes: Extra digit formation; usually survivable but flags developmental noise.

anomalies.label: Microphthalmia
anomalies.notes: Underdeveloped eye tissue; can affect one or both eyes.

anomalies.label: Chondrodysplasia / Dwarfism
anomalies.notes: Disproportionate skeletal growth condition; future structural system can refine this.

anomalies.label: Gigantism / Overgrowth
anomalies.notes: Excessive growth pattern; can increase cardiac and orthopedic burden.

anomalies.label: Cleft Palate
anomalies.notes: Craniofacial midline defect; severe neonatal survival impact.

anomalies.label: Limb Reduction Defect
anomalies.notes: Incomplete or malformed limb development; major functional penalty.

anomalies.label: Severe Craniofacial Defect
anomalies.notes: Severe craniofacial developmental failure; very poor survival outlook.

anomalies.label: Nonviable Developmental Disorder
anomalies.notes: Severe systemic developmental failure; future neonatal mortality system can consume this.

anomalies.label: XY Gonadal Dysgenesis
anomalies.notes: XY chromosomal pattern with incomplete gonadal development; reserved for later advanced DSD simulation.

anomalies.label: XX Ovotesticular DSD
anomalies.notes: XX individual with ovotesticular tissue; reserved for later advanced DSD simulation.
